title: 11 Herbal Cream Options for Female Athletes Dealing with Amenorrhea
description: Lavandula angustifolia creams may help with amenorrhea due to its properties and constituents, including linalool and linalyl acetate, which have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. These compounds may help to relax the uterine muscles and reduce cramping, thereby promoting menstrual flow.
